message:
test(raptorq): validate unknown_state_with_low_confidence governance fallback reason

Adds a test asserting that unknown_state_with_low_confidence is accepted
as a canonical governance fallback reason in the RaptorQ unit log schema.
This codifies the expectation that the governance layer can legitimately
produce this classification when confidence is insufficient for a
definitive state determination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
